parameters.content:
## OLDEV: List Hygiene & Deliverability Pre-Flight
The front half of any CRM migration or bulk send: validate, dedupe, drop disposable/role-based, bucket into clean / risky / suppress, and score the sending domain (SPF / DKIM / DMARC) before a single email goes out. Synthetic data; no credentials needed.

### Why this matters
Gmail & Yahoo bulk-sender rules (enforced 2025) require SPF + DKIM + DMARC and a low complaint rate. Sending to invalid, role-based, or disposable addresses tanks reputation. This workflow stops that before the send.
